title: Cattleya aurantiaca
taxonomy: Cattleya aurantiaca is classified within the Orchidaceae family, specifically within the subtribe Laeliinae and genus Cattleya. The Cattleya aurantiaca is further divided into the subgenus Cattleya, section Cattleya, and section Crispae. This classification reflects its unique characteristics and distinct features among other orchid species. The Cattleya aurantiaca's classification is also influenced by its physical and morphological attributes. The exact classification may vary depending on the source and the specific criteria used.
